title: Pixel users report phones freezing on startup screen after latest Google update, company responds
summary: After the March 2026 Pixel update, many users report their devices are stuck in bootloop, making them unusable. Google has also responded to the issue saying that it is actively looking for a solution, and recommends contacting Pixel support for help.

title: Mac users, update your ChatGPT app immediately: OpenAI issues urgent security warning
summary: OpenAI reported a security issue related to third-party library Axios. The company said it found no evidence of compromised user data or altered systems.&nbsp;

title: How to edit your comments on Instagram? Check step-by-step guide
summary: Instagram now allow users to edit comments within 15 minutes of posting. Users can make unlimited edits during this time, but only the text portion can be changed, and an edited label will be visible to others.

summary: OpenAI has claimed that it has a significant advantage over Anthropic due to its early expansion of computing resources. The company also said in a leaked memo that Claude Mythos was delayed due to computing issues.

title: 'The biggest consumer fraud': Telegram CEO claims WhatsApp is secretly reading your private messages
summary: Telegram's CEO Pavel Durov has criticized WhatsApp's encryption claims, labeling them as ‘biggest consumer fraud in history’. Durov asserted that WhatsApp reads users' messages and shares them, a sentiment echoed by Elon Musk.&nbsp;

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman issues 'ring of power' warning on AGI
summary: Sam Altman said the race to develop artificial general intelligence (AGI) is driving intense competition and conflict among AI companies in a bid to seize control, adding that AGI carries significant societal risks and must not be controlled by a small group of companies.

title: Former OpenAI Stargate leaders plan to join Meta Platforms
summary: Three key players in OpenAI’s massive effort to set up hundreds of billions of dollars’ worth of artificial intelligence data center capacity are joining Meta Platforms. Peter Hoeschele, who played a critical role in OpenAI’s Stargate initiative, is one of the new hires.

title: OpenAI identifies security issue involving third-party tool, says user data was not accessed
summary: OpenAI said on Friday it had identified a ​security issue involving a ​third-party developer tool called Axios and is ​taking steps to protect the process that certifies its macOS applications are legitimate OpenAI apps.
